# Cha0smagick Labs — Chaos Magick, Cybermancy & Digital Occult Tools

> Corporate Cybermancy Solutions — since 2025. Explore the Art and Practice of Chaos Magick through free online tools, premium Android apps, and educational PDF resources.

## Site Overview

Cha0smagick Labs is a digital occult platform offering free online chaos magick tools (sigil generators, rune oracles, I Ching, lunar phase calculator, Tengwar transcriber), premium Android apps (PSI GYM, Chaos Sigil Generator, Norse Rune Oracle, Arcana Goetia, Dream Machine, I Ching Oracle, Lunar Phase Calculator, Unofficial Rider Waite Tarot), and educational PDFs (Magical Servitors Manual, Liber Lvpinux, Ouija Cazadora, Treatise of Chaos Hunter Runes). The site also hosts an extensive blog with 40+ articles on chaos magick theory, practice, divination, and app reviews.

## Key Pages

### Tools (Free Online)
- **Sigil Generator** — tools/sigil-generator.html
- **I Ching Oracle** — tools/iching.html
- **Viking Runes** — tools/viking-runes.html
- **Lunar Phase Calculator** — tools/lunar-phase.html
- **Tengwar Transcriber** — tools/tengwar-transcriber.html
- **Magickal Servitor Activator** — tools/activador-servidores.html
- **All Tools** — tools/index.html

## Blog Topics

The blog (blog/) covers chaos magick fundamentals, sigil creation methods (Austin Osman Spare, cryptographic, digital), servitor and egregore theory, divination systems (I Ching, runes, Zener cards, tarot, scrying), lucid dreaming and astral projection, planetary magic, goetic magic, banishing and space cleansing, cybermancy and technomancy, app reviews, PDF reviews, moon phase ritual timing, and chaos magick history.

- Chaos Magick for Beginners: Complete Guide — blog/chaos-magick-beginners-complete-guide.html
- The Ultimate Sigil Maker Guide — blog/sigil-maker-ultimate-guide.html
- Sigil Engine: Cryptographic Sigil Generation — blog/sigil-engine-cryptographic-guide.html

- Paradigm Shift & Belief as a Tool — blog/paradigm-shift-belief-as-tool.html
- What is Gnosis? How to Achieve Gnosis — blog/what-is-gnosis-how-to-achieve.html
- How to Charge a Sigil Correctly — blog/how-to-charge-sigil-correctly.html
- Norse Runes for Beginners — blog/norse-runes-beginners-guide.html

- Master Lucid Dreaming — blog/lucid-dreaming-guide.html
- Goetic Magic for Beginners — blog/goetic-magic-beginners-guide.html

- Egregore Creation: Collective Thought Forms — blog/egregore-creation-collective-thought-forms.html

## SEO & Technical Notes
- Language: primarily English (EN), with Spanish (ES) hreflang on activador-servidores page
- Canonical URLs use https://cha0smagicklabs.com/ with trailing slash on root, .html on all pages
- Schema types used: SoftwareApplication, WebApplication, FAQPage, QAPage, HowTo, Article, ContactPoint, AggregateRating
- Sitemap: sitemap.xml
- CSS: style.min.css (single minified stylesheet)
- JS: app-render.min.js, apps-data.min.js, visitor-map.min.js, shared.min.js
- Mobile-responsive design with dark theme
- Google Analytics via G-V6LHCPN9TK (privacy-focused, analytics_storage denied by default)
